languages.text: "Я и мой коллега подтверждаем: аутопсированный кадавр представляет собой генетическую абоминацию экстремального порядка. Едва ли это случайный казус, Вольный Торговец. Результаты взятых мной проб однозначно подтверждают то, что облик кадавра является мимикрией, создающей видимость человека; плоть же его — средоточие инородной мерзости".

"My colleague and I can confirm: the autopsied cadaver is a genetic abomination of the highest order. Hardly a coincidence, Rogue Trader. The results of the samples I have taken show unequivocally that the exterior of the cadaver is but mimicry of the human form, while its flesh is the epitome of alien vileness."
languages.original_text: "Я и мой коллега подтверждаем: аутопсированный кадавр представляет собой генетическую абоминацию экстремального порядка. Едва ли это случайный казус, Вольный Торговец. Результаты взятых мной проб однозначно подтверждают то, что облик кадавра является мимикрией, создающей видимость человека; плоть же его — средоточие инородной мерзости".

The results of the samples I have taken show unequivocally that the exterior of the cadaver is but mimicry of the human form, while its flesh is the epitome of alien vileness."

"My colleague and I can confirm: the autopsied cadaver is a genetic abomination of the highest order. Hardly a coincidence, Rogue Trader. The results of the samples I have taken show unequivocally that the exterior of the cadaver is but mimicry of the human form, while its flesh is the epitome of alien vileness."

"My colleague and I can confirm: the autopsied cadaver is a genetic abomination of the highest order. Hardly a coincidence, Rogue Trader. The results of the samples I have taken show unequivocally that the exterior of the cadaver is but mimicry of the human form, while its flesh is the epitome of alien vileness."

languages.text: «Mi colega y yo estamos en posición de confirmarlo: el cadáver de la autopsia es una abominación genética del máximo orden. No es coincidencia, Comerciante Independiente. Los resultados de las muestras que he extraído muestran de forma inequívoca que el exterior del cadáver es una imitación de la forma humana, mientras que su carne es una aberración alienígena».
languages.original_text: "My colleague and I can confirm: the autopsied cadaver is a genetic abomination of the highest order. Hardly a coincidence, Rogue Trader. The results of the samples I have taken show unequivocally that the exterior of the cadaver is but mimicry of the human form, while its flesh is the epitome of alien vileness."

traits.locale_text: «Mi colega y yo estamos en posición de confirmarlo: el cadáver de la autopsia es una abominación genética del máximo orden. No es coincidencia, Comerciante Independiente. Los resultados de las muestras que he extraído muestran de forma inequívoca que el exterior del cadáver es una imitación de la forma humana, mientras que su carne es una aberración alienígena».

languages.text: “我和我的同僚可以确认：这具解剖尸体是最极端的基因畸变体。行商浪人，这绝非巧合。我采集的样本结果清楚地显示，这具尸体的外表不过是对人类形态的拙劣模仿，而它的血肉，则是异形污秽的极致体现。”
languages.original_text: "My colleague and I can confirm: the autopsied cadaver is a genetic abomination of the highest order. Hardly a coincidence, Rogue Trader. The results of the samples I have taken show unequivocally that the exterior of the cadaver is but mimicry of the human form, while its flesh is the epitome of alien vileness."

traits.locale_text: “我和我的同僚可以确认：这具解剖尸体是最极端的基因畸变体。行商浪人，这绝非巧合。我采集的样本结果清楚地显示，这具尸体的外表不过是对人类形态的拙劣模仿，而它的血肉，则是异形污秽的极致体现。”

languages.text: « Mon collègue et moi sommes d'accord : le cadavre autopsié est une abomination génétique de la pire espèce. Ce n'est pas une coïncidence, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Les analyses des échantillons que j'ai prélevés sont formelles : le cadavre imite l'apparence d'un humain, mais sa chair est celle d'une ignoble créature non humaine. »
languages.original_text: "My colleague and I can confirm: the autopsied cadaver is a genetic abomination of the highest order. Hardly a coincidence, Rogue Trader. The results of the samples I have taken show unequivocally that the exterior of the cadaver is but mimicry of the human form, while its flesh is the epitome of alien vileness."

traits.locale_text: « Mon collègue et moi sommes d'accord : le cadavre autopsié est une abomination génétique de la pire espèce. Ce n'est pas une coïncidence, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Les analyses des échantillons que j'ai prélevés sont formelles : le cadavre imite l'apparence d'un humain, mais sa chair est celle d'une ignoble créature non humaine. »

languages.text: "Meslektaşım ve ben durumu doğrulayabiliriz: Otopsisi yapılan kadavra, üst düzeyde genetik bir ucube. Bu hiç de tesadüf değil Hür Tacir. Aldığım numunelerin sonuçları; kadavranın dış görünüşünün insan formunun sadece bir taklidi olduğunu, etinin ise uzaylı pisliğinin ta kendisi olduğunu açıkça gösteriyor."
languages.original_text: "My colleague and I can confirm: the autopsied cadaver is a genetic abomination of the highest order. Hardly a coincidence, Rogue Trader. The results of the samples I have taken show unequivocally that the exterior of the cadaver is but mimicry of the human form, while its flesh is the epitome of alien vileness."

traits.locale_text: "Meslektaşım ve ben durumu doğrulayabiliriz: Otopsisi yapılan kadavra, üst düzeyde genetik bir ucube. Bu hiç de tesadüf değil Hür Tacir. Aldığım numunelerin sonuçları; kadavranın dış görünüşünün insan formunun sadece bir taklidi olduğunu, etinin ise uzaylı pisliğinin ta kendisi olduğunu açıkça gösteriyor."

languages.text: 「我が同僚と私は確認できます――解剖された死体は最高位の遺伝的忌まわしき産物です。偶然などとはとても言えません、ローグトレーダー。私が採取した標本の結果は、この死体の外見が人間の姿の模倣にすぎず、その肉こそ異星の汚らわしさの極みであることを、明白に示しています」
languages.original_text: "My colleague and I can confirm: the autopsied cadaver is a genetic abomination of the highest order. Hardly a coincidence, Rogue Trader. The results of the samples I have taken show unequivocally that the exterior of the cadaver is but mimicry of the human form, while its flesh is the epitome of alien vileness."

traits.locale_text: 「我が同僚と私は確認できます――解剖された死体は最高位の遺伝的忌まわしき産物です。偶然などとはとても言えません、ローグトレーダー。私が採取した標本の結果は、この死体の外見が人間の姿の模倣にすぎず、その肉こそ異星の汚らわしさの極みであることを、明白に示しています」

languages.text: "Mein Kollege und ich können bestätigen, der sezierte Kadaver ist eine genetische Abscheulichkeit höchsten Grades. Das kann kein Zufall sein, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Die Ergebnisse der genommenen Proben zeigen unmissverständlich, dass die Außenhaut des Kadavers zwar die menschliche Form imitiert, das Fleisch aber der Inbegriff außerirdischer Schändlichkeit ist."
languages.original_text: "My colleague and I can confirm: the autopsied cadaver is a genetic abomination of the highest order. Hardly a coincidence, Rogue Trader. The results of the samples I have taken show unequivocally that the exterior of the cadaver is but mimicry of the human form, while its flesh is the epitome of alien vileness."

Die Ergebnisse der genommenen Proben zeigen unmissverständlich, dass die Außenhaut des Kadavers zwar die menschliche Form imitiert, das Fleisch aber der Inbegriff außerirdischer Schändlichkeit ist."
